# UpdateOrderExtendedRequest

Request body to update extended data related to order.

## Properties

------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**shipment_details** | [**Array&lt;ShipmentDetails&gt;**](ShipmentDetails.md) | Shipment details, such as the tracking company, tracking number, and tracking URLs, associated with the shipping of an order.
